feature: Enterprise Agent Platform Sprint 2: Gemini Media + Voice

tasks.title: Add Gemini MCP setup script and configuration
tasks.description: Create scripts/setup-gemini-mcp.sh to add Gemini MCP to user's ~/.mcp.json. Update install.sh to reference it. Add fal.ai as documented alternative.

tasks.title: Create /prototype command for UI mockup generation
tasks.description: Create commands/prototype.md — takes a UI description, calls Gemini image generation MCP, saves to docs/{project}/mockups/, sends via Telegram if in context.

tasks.title: Create /demo-video command for video generation
tasks.description: Create commands/demo-video.md — reads mockup images, generates video via Veo/Gemini, saves to docs/{project}/demos/, sends via Telegram.

tasks.title: Create voice transcription hook for Telegram voice messages
tasks.description: Create hooks/voice-transcribe.sh — detects OGG voice attachments from Telegram, converts via ffmpeg, sends to Whisper API, returns transcription text.

tasks.title: Create /voice-brief command
tasks.description: Create commands/voice-brief.md — takes transcribed text (from voice or typed), structures into problem/solution/users/constraints brief, saves to docs/{feature}/brief.md.

tasks.title: Update AGENTS.md and run verification
tasks.description: Add Sprint 2 patterns/gotchas to AGENTS.md. Verify all new files are syntactically correct.
